# Dani Ferreira

Dani Ferreira manages procurement at Acme Corp and is the operational lead for the supplier engagement workstream within the carbon baseline engagement. Dani is coordinating supplier data requests, tracking response rates, and flagging spend categories with limited data coverage. Their supplier network access is critical for the Scope 3 phase-two scoping effort.

Dani reports to COO Reema Sharma and acts as the gatekeeper for supplier data: nothing reaches the baseline without going through procurement. Supportive of the engagement, but realistic about how slowly supplier responses come in.
